title: OpenAI launches DeployCo to help businesses build around intelligence
summary: OpenAI launches DeployCo, a new enterprise deployment company built to help organizations bring frontier AI into production and turn it into measurable business impact.
title_es: OpenAI lanza DeployCo para desplegar IA en producción
bajada: OpenAI crea una nueva división empresarial dedicada a ayudar organizaciones a llevar modelos de IA avanzados a producción y generar impacto medible en sus negocios. Este movimiento refleja la apuesta de OpenAI por consolidarse en el mercado enterprise.
bajada_en: OpenAI launches a new enterprise division to help organizations deploy frontier AI models in production and drive measurable business impact. This move reflects OpenAI's commitment to establishing itself in the enterprise market.

title: Google stopped a zero-day hack that it says was developed with AI
summary: For the first time, Google says it has spotted and stopped a zero-day exploit developed with AI. According to a report from Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG), "prominent cyber crime threat actors" were planning to use the vulnerability for a "mass exploitation event" that would have allowed them to bypass two-factor authentication on an unnamed […]
title_es: Google detiene ataque de día-cero desarrollado con IA
bajada: Google reportó que detuvo por primera vez un exploit de día-cero desarrollado con IA antes de ser usado en ataques masivos. El hallazgo muestra que actores maliciosos ya utilizan IA para crear vulnerabilidades, escalando la carrera de seguridad cibernética.
bajada_en: Google reported stopping a zero-day exploit developed with AI before mass exploitation. The discovery shows malicious actors are already using AI to create vulnerabilities, escalating the cybersecurity arms race.

title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. Elon Musk, his financial […]
title_es: Musk vs. Altman: juicio que define el futuro de OpenAI
bajada: Elon Musk y Sam Altman se enfrentan en un juicio de alto impacto que podría alterar el futuro de OpenAI. Musk acusa a la empresa de abandonar su misión fundacional de beneficio humano para priorizar ganancias.
bajada_en: Elon Musk and Sam Altman face a high-stakes trial that could reshape OpenAI's future. Musk accuses the company of abandoning its founding mission of benefiting humanity to prioritize profits.

title: May 5, 2026AnnouncementsAgents for financial services
summary: Announcements Agents for financial services May 5, 2026 We’re releasing ten ready-to-run agent templates for the most time-consuming work in financial services: building pitchbooks, screening KYC files, and closing the books at month-end. Each one ships as a plugin in Claude Cowork and Claude Code, and as a cookbook for Claude Managed Agents , so a team can put Claude on real financial work in days rather than months. Claude also now works across Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Outlook (coming soon) through the Claude add-ins for Microsoft 365. Once the add-ins are installed, context carries automatically between applications, so work that starts in a model can end in a deck without re-explaining anything in between. Finally, we’re continuing to expand our partner ecosystem with new connectors and an MCP app, so the agents draw on the data financial professionals already use. Connectors give Claude governed, real-time access to a provider’s data, and MCP apps go a step further by embedding the provider’s own tools directly inside Claude. These updates pair best with Claude Opus 4.7, which is state-of-the-art on financial tasks and leads the industry on Vals AI's Finance Agent benchmark , at 64.37%. New agent templates for finance work Each agent template is a reference architecture that packages three things: skills (instructions and domain knowledge for the task), connectors (governed access to the data the task runs on), and subagents (additional Claude models that are called upon by the main agent, for specific sub-tasks such as comparables selection or methodology checks). Firms can adapt any of them to their own modeling conventions, risk policies, and approval flows. Enable these new agent templates either as plugins within Claude Cowork or Claude Code, or as cookbooks for Claude Managed Agents. Find all the plugins and cookbooks at the financial services marketplace . The full list of new agents is as follows: Research and client coverage Pitch builder
title_es: Anthropic lanza agentes Claude para servicios financieros
bajada: Anthropic liberó diez plantillas de agentes listos para usar en servicios financieros, desde creación de pitchbooks hasta cierre mensual de libros. Claude ahora integra Microsoft 365 (Excel, PowerPoint, Word) y se expande con nuevos conectores y herramientas.
bajada_en: Anthropic released ten ready-to-run agent templates for financial services, from pitchbook creation to month-end closing. Claude now integrates Microsoft 365 apps and expands with new connectors and tools.

title: NVIDIA and SAP Bring Trust to Specialized Agents
summary: Announced today at SAP Sapphire — where NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang joined  SAP CEO Christian Klein’s keynote by video — SAP and NVIDIA’s expanded collaboration helps enterprises run specialized agents with security and governance controls.
title_es: NVIDIA y SAP crean agentes especializados con seguridad
bajada: NVIDIA y SAP anunciaron una colaboración expandida para que empresas ejecuten agentes de IA especializados con controles de seguridad y gobernanza. La iniciativa busca facilitar el despliegue seguro de agentes en entornos empresariales.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and SAP announced an expanded collaboration to enable enterprises to run specialized AI agents with security and governance controls. The initiative aims to streamline safe agent deployment in enterprise environments.

title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
summary: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your input and generates a response at the same time, so it's more like a phone call than a text chain.
title_es: Thinking Machines: IA que escucha y habla simultáneamente
bajada: Thinking Machines, liderada por la ex-CTO de OpenAI Mira Murati, está desarrollando "interaction models" que procesan entrada y generan respuestas en paralelo, imitando conversaciones naturales. Este enfoque busca mejorar significativamente la calidad de las interacciones humano-IA.
bajada_en: Thinking Machines, led by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, is developing "interaction models" that process input and generate responses simultaneously, mimicking natural conversations. This approach aims to significantly improve human-AI interaction quality.

title: OpenAI just released its answer to Claude Mythos
summary: OpenAI is launching Daybreak, an AI initiative focused on detecting and patching vulnerabilities before attackers find them. Daybreak uses the Codex Security AI agent that launched in March to create a threat model based on an organization's code and focus on possible attack paths, validate likely vulnerabilities, and then automate the detection of the higher […]
title_es: OpenAI lanza Daybreak: detección proactiva de vulnerabilidades
bajada: OpenAI presentó Daybreak, una iniciativa que utiliza su agente de IA Codex Security para detectar y parchear vulnerabilidades antes de ser explotadas. La herramienta genera modelos de amenaza basados en código y automatiza la validación de vulnerabilidades.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced Daybreak, an initiative using its Codex Security AI agent to detect and patch vulnerabilities before exploitation. The tool generates threat models based on code and automates vulnerability validation.

title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
summary: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.
title_es: Vapi alcanza $500M en valoración tras ganar a Amazon
bajada: La startup de voz Vapi consiguió una valuación de $500 millones después de que Amazon Ring eligiera su plataforma sobre 40 competidores. Su negocio empresarial creció 10 veces desde inicios de 2025, impulsado por la migración de centros de contacto a agentes IA.
bajada_en: Voice startup Vapi reached a $500M valuation after Amazon Ring selected its platform over 40 competitors. Its enterprise business grew 10x since early 2025, driven by contact centers shifting to AI agents.

title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
summary: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.
title_es: GM despide trabajadores IT para contratar especialistas en IA
bajada: General Motors despidió cientos de trabajadores de IT para contratar profesionales con habilidades avanzadas en IA, incluyendo desarrollo nativo de IA, data engineering y prompt engineering. La medida refleja la transformación tecnológica acelerada de la industria automotriz.
bajada_en: General Motors laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire professionals with advanced AI skills, including AI-native development, data engineering, and prompt engineering. The move reflects the auto industry's accelerated technological transformation.

title: Here’s what Mira Murati’s AI company is up to
summary: Thinking Machines, the AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, announced Monday that it's working on something called "interaction models." The idea behind interaction models, according to Thinking Machines, is that they will let people "collaborate with AI the way we naturally collaborate with each other - they continuously take in audio, video, […]
title_es: Thinking Machines presenta modelos de interacción humano-IA
bajada: Thinking Machines anunció el desarrollo de "interaction models" que permiten colaborar con IA de forma natural, procesando audio y video continuamente. La iniciativa busca replicar la manera en que colaboramos entre humanos.
bajada_en: Thinking Machines announced "interaction models" enabling natural AI collaboration through continuous audio and video processing. The initiative aims to replicate how humans naturally collaborate.

title: Why Lightspeed Backed This Agent Evaluation Startup’s Back-to-Back Rounds
summary: Alex Shanmay not have been old enough to legally buy alcohol in 2023, but he was still old enough to start his own company and join the AI boom.Shan was 20 when he was first introduced toJames Alcorn, an investment partner atLightspeed Venture Partners, through a fellowStanford Universityclassmate. Shan, who started college at 16, had studied new ways to evaluate and monitor the performance of AI models at the prestigiousNatural Language Processing Groupat theStanford Artificial Intelligence Laboratory. (The NLP Group is led by Stanford professorChristopher Manning, one of the most-cited NLP researchers in the world.)For months, Alcorn and Shan, along with his childhood friends,Andrew LiandJoseph Camyre, brainstormed ideas for startups before landing on one related to Shan’s area of research. Monitoring the performance of AI models is particularly en vogue as AI agents explode in popularity but still make lots of mistakes.Lightspeed last year led back-to-back financings of Shan’s company,Judgment Labs, most recently valuing it at $175 million, including $32 million in new capital, according to a person with knowledge of the round. (SV AngelandValor Equity Partners, known for heavily backingElon Musk-related firms, also participated.)
title_es: Judgment Labs levanta $32M para evaluación de agentes IA
bajada: Judgment Labs, startup de evaluación de agentes IA respaldada por Lightspeed, recaudó $32 millones en nueva inversión con valoración de $175 millones. La empresa aborda la creciente necesidad de monitorear rendimiento de agentes a medida que proliferan pero generan errores.
bajada_en: Judgment Labs, an AI agent evaluation startup backed by Lightspeed, raised $32M at a $175M valuation. The company addresses the growing need to monitor agent performance as they proliferate but still make mistakes.

title: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
summary: A new startup called Dessn has raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.
title_es: Dessn recauda $6M para herramienta de diseño con IA
bajada: Dessn, una nueva startup, levantó $6 millones para desarrollar herramientas de diseño impulsadas por IA que operan directamente con bases de código en producción. Busca acelerar el workflow entre diseño y desarrollo.
bajada_en: Dessn, a new startup, raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases. It aims to accelerate the design-to-development workflow.

title: Google Adds Klarna, Affirm as AI Shopping Payment Options
summary: Google will start offering buy now, pay later services Affirm and Klarna for AI-powered shopping transactions in its Gemini app and its AI search mode, the rival fintechs announced on Tuesday.The launch is an expansion of both firms’ existing relationships with Google—Affirm has already ...
title_es: Google integra Klarna y Affirm en compras con Gemini
bajada: Google agregó servicios de compra ahora paga después (BNPL) de Klarna y Affirm en Gemini y su modo de búsqueda con IA. La integración expande el ecosistema de pagos en transacciones de compra impulsadas por IA.
bajada_en: Google added buy now, pay later services Klarna and Affirm to Gemini and its AI search mode. The integration expands the payment ecosystem for AI-powered shopping transactions.

title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
title_es: ChatGPT crece 10x entre usuarios mayores de 35 años
bajada: OpenAI reportó que adopción de ChatGPT se aceleró en Q1 2026, con crecimiento más rápido entre usuarios mayores de 35 años y uso más equilibrado por género. El dato señala expansión hacia demografía mainstream.
bajada_en: OpenAI reported ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage. The data signals expansion toward mainstream demographics.

title: The new AI-powered Google Finance is expanding to Europe.
summary: A screenshot of the AI-powered experience on Google Finance.
title_es: Google Finance con IA llega a Europa
bajada: Google expandió su experiencia de Google Finance impulsada por IA hacia Europa. La expansión acerca herramientas de análisis financiero potenciadas por IA a más usuarios globales.
bajada_en: Google expanded its AI-powered Google Finance experience to Europe. The expansion brings AI-enhanced financial analysis tools to more global users.
